events.title: Referral received
events.detail: New referral from Saint Francis Memorial for client 1080. Starting intake pipeline.

events.title: Client profile structured
events.detail: Diet orders: diabetic, cardiovascular. Allergies: shellfish, fish. Sodium ceiling 650 mg/meal, carbs 40–55 g/meal. Prefers Italian; dislikes mushrooms. Cooking ability: stovetop. 10 meals/week, zone Mission.

events.title: Dispatching Clinical Matching Agent
events.detail: Hard constraint hierarchy locked: allergens → sodium → carbs → diet-order tags. Exclusion rules, never scoring penalties.

events.title: Scanning inventory
events.detail: Scoring all 80 meals against hard constraints, then ranking survivors by cuisine preference and dislike avoidance.

events.title: Rejected: Chicken Pasta Primavera
events.detail: Excluded — carbs: 63 g outside 40–55 g range.

events.title: Rejected: Turkey Bolognese with Whole-Wheat Pasta
events.detail: Excluded — carbs: 56 g outside 40–55 g range.

events.title: Matched: Tuscan White Bean Soup
events.detail: All hard checks pass — sodium 413/650 mg ✓, carbs 53 g (target 40–55) ✓, no shellfish/fish ✓.

events.title: Matched: Grilled Chicken with Creamy Polenta
events.detail: All hard checks pass — sodium 445/650 mg ✓, carbs 52 g (target 40–55) ✓, no shellfish/fish ✓.

events.title: Matched: Minestrone with Whole-Grain Roll
events.detail: All hard checks pass — sodium 462/650 mg ✓, carbs 55 g (target 40–55) ✓, no shellfish/fish ✓.

events.title: Route assigned
events.detail: Client 1080 added to route R-MISS-1 (Mission), delivery 2026-07-21, window 14:00–16:00. Cold chain OK.

events.title: Plan complete
events.detail: Client 1080: 10 compliant meal(s) at fallback level 0. 0 hard-constraint violations.
